_doc: Butterfly chip-0 capture spec (Phase-4 ENTITY MOVEMENT, plans/movement-system.md). Hooks 0x47b990 (the EFFECT-band actor AI) onEnter and reads the butterfly FSM state + body position per sim-tick. 0x47b990 is mode-1-EFFECT-band-only, and the 4 town butterflies (code 0xe29a) are the ONLY mode-1 EFFECT actors (quirk #95) -> the capture is butterflies-only (the `code` field confirms). param_2 == *(this+0x40) == the render-state/body; body+4/+8 = worldX/Y, +0x18 vel, +0x2c facing, +0x38 state, render-state+0x72 = the drawn frame. The 16-bit FSM fields (gate/cooldown/state/timers/celfr/bstate) are read as u32 -> MASK & 0xffff offline (ctFormatTyped has no u16). THROWAWAY capture spec: the durable retail_fields.json annotation lands once chip 1 is validated. Run: frida_capture.py --no-turbo --lockstep --seed-pin --input-trace tests/scenarios/in-game-intro/trace-retail.jsonl --field-spec tools/flow/butterfly_capture_fields.json --field-spec-only --call-trace --call-trace-frames <game_enter..+~280 ticks>.

0x47b990.name: butterfly_ai
0x47b990._note: FUN_0047b990 (7461 B) the per-actor EFFECT-band behaviour; the butterfly takes the 0xe29a case (47b990.c:769-801): wander range 0xc890=(rand*0xc80>>15)+0x640, decrement flip-cooldown 0x14248, 10% flag, flip heading 0x14244 1<->3 when |worldX-bound| < 0xc81 OR a 0x47dbb0 collision OR the 10% roll, then FUN_0043f880(bound,0xc80,body,...) which writes the 8-int command block to this+0x14854; the apply is the band-walk's SECOND EFFECT pass 0x485fc0 -> FUN_00442a70(this+0x14854, body, body) (46cd70.c:71, 485fc0.c:348). Captured per sim-tick (chip 0). cmd_* at onEnter = the PREVIOUS tick's resolved command (pos here = post-apply of it).

fields.name: celfr
fields.reason: render-state+0x72 drawn frame (mask&0xffff); the direction->cel_fr map

fields.name: cooldown
fields.reason: this+0x14248 flip cooldown (mask&0xffff); set 0x3c on flip

fields.name: state
fields.reason: this+0x1422c state selector (mask&0xffff); the 0x47b990 state switch

fields.name: bound1
fields.reason: this+0x14264 patrol bound (heading 1 target) -- the decompile LIE, no static write
